title: [Skyship, The Mounds]
description: Twin, rectangular and parallel raised mounds of packed earth built up on the stone floor run the length of two sides of the room.  Atop each mound is a weathered bone totem assembled from a varied collection of skeletal remains.  Flanking these totems are bright banners stitched with runic symbols.  The room's middle is set in a slight depression, with the stone floor sloping away from the mounds.  Thick crimson lines are drawn across the floor in runic symbols mirroring those on the banners.
